title: Stasis chamber fixer
description: This plugin fixes stasis chamber by not making u need to go in a nether portal and unload the chunks to make a stasis chamber.
body:
This plugin resolves Stasis Chambers by not making you go through a nether portal to make the stasis rod, but instead you put the fishing rod bobber on the pressure plate and a sound plays and the bobber resets, thats when you know that it worked.

**Fishing rod data is saved in a folder in plugins folder so no one loses their stasis chamber by restart or something else.**

I hope you like my plugin. 💖
